scripts.build: npm run build:db && npm run build:core && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.test:e2e:auth: npm run build && npx playwright test --config apps/web/e2e/playwright.auth.config.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:db && npm run build:core && npm run build:api && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run build && node packages/db/dist/tests/auth-sqlite-repositories.test.js && node packages/core/dist/tests/auth-service.test.js && node apps/api/dist/tests/auth-api.test.js && node apps/web/dist/tests/auth-web.test.js
